name: Khem Sorn Plai
original_name: เข็มซ่อนปลาย
overview: A young woman named Cherd is trapped in a loveless marriage to Dr. Ruengboon abroad, where she falls in love with Lanna, a Thai student. When Lanna returns home and marries the elegant Yaowayod, chosen by his mother, he seems to have the perfect life—but his heart still quietly belongs to Cherd.

trailers.title: เข็มซ่อนปลาย [Official Trailer] Ver.3
